'''poyamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulcerated|ulcerated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulcerated|ulcerated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| poyamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyamithi|poyamithi]] || [[word:poyamiji|poyamiji]] || [[word:poyamishi|poyamishi]] || [[word:poyamiki|poyamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyamuthuthu|poyamuthuthu]] || [[word:poyamujuju|poyamujuju]] || [[word:poyamushushu|poyamushushu]] || [[word:poyamukuku|poyamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyamuthu|poyamuthu]] || [[word:poyamuju|poyamuju]] || [[word:poyamushu|poyamushu]] || [[word:poyamuku|poyamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyamufthuf|poyamufthuf]] || [[word:poyamufjuf|poyamufjuf]] || [[word:poyamufshuf|poyamufshuf]] || [[word:poyamufkuf|poyamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyamethe|poyamethe]] || [[word:poyameje|poyameje]] || [[word:poyameshe|poyameshe]] || [[word:poyameke|poyameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyamothotho|poyamothotho]] || [[word:poyamojojo|poyamojojo]] || [[word:poyamoshosho|poyamoshosho]] || [[word:poyamokoko|poyamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyamotho|poyamotho]] || [[word:poyamojo|poyamojo]] || [[word:poyamosho|poyamosho]] || [[word:poyamoko|poyamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyamofthof|poyamofthof]] || [[word:poyamofjof|poyamofjof]] || [[word:poyamofshof|poyamofshof]] || [[word:poyamofkof|poyamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfthÃŸf|poyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfjÃŸf|poyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfshÃŸf|poyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfkÃŸf|poyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|poyamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|poyamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|poyamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|poyamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfthÃŸf|poyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfjÃŸf|poyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfshÃŸf|poyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfkÃŸf|poyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfthÃŸf|poyamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfjÃŸf|poyamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfshÃŸf|poyamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyamÃŸfkÃŸf|poyamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyamÃḊthÃḊ|poyamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:poyamÃḊjÃḊ|poyamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:poyamÃḊshÃḊ|poyamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:poyamÃḊkÃḊ|poyamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyamathatha|poyamathatha]] || [[word:poyamajaja|poyamajaja]] || [[word:poyamashasha|poyamashasha]] || [[word:poyamakaka|poyamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyamatha|poyamatha]] || [[word:poyamaja|poyamaja]] || [[word:poyamasha|poyamasha]] || [[word:poyamaka|poyamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyamafthaf|poyamafthaf]] || [[word:poyamafjaf|poyamafjaf]] || [[word:poyamafshaf|poyamafshaf]] || [[word:poyamafkaf|poyamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:poyamasha|poyamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyamshÃḋasha|poyamshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyamroasha|poyamroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyammuasha|poyammuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyamyaasha|poyamyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyamnkshÃḋasha|gopoyamnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyamnkroasha|gopoyamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyamnkmuasha|gopoyamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyamnkyaasha|gopoyamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:poyayamasha|poyayamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyayamshÃḋasha|poyayamshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyayamroasha|poyayamroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyayammuasha|poyayammuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyayamyaasha|poyayamyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyayamnkshÃḋasha|gopoyayamnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyayamnkroasha|gopoyayamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyayamnkmuasha|gopoyayamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyayamnkyaasha|gopoyayamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:peyÃḊmasha|peyÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:peyÃḊmshÃḋasha|peyÃḊmshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:peyÃḊmroasha|peyÃḊmroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:peyÃḊmmuasha|peyÃḊmmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:peyÃḊmyaasha|peyÃḊmyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊmnkshÃḋasha|gopeyÃḊmnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊmnkroasha|gopeyÃḊmnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊmnkmuasha|gopeyÃḊmnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊmnkyaasha|gopeyÃḊmnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:poyfamasha|poyfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyfamshÃḋasha|poyfamshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyfamroasha|poyfamroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyfammuasha|poyfammuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyfamyaasha|poyfamyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyfamnkshÃḋasha|gopoyfamnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyfamnkroasha|gopoyfamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyfamnkmuasha|gopoyfamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyfamnkyaasha|gopoyfamnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
